children.heading: Account
children.label: 1 Account
children.text: The term “account” means any account intended for use by and generally used by consumers primarily for personal, family, or household purposes that is offered by a depository institution into which a consumer deposits funds, including demand accounts, time accounts, negotiable order of withdrawal accounts, and share draft accounts.

children.heading: Annual percentage yield
children.label: 2 Annual percentage yield
children.text: The term “annual percentage yield” means the total amount of interest that would be received on a $100 deposit, based on the annual rate of simple interest and the frequency of compounding for a 365-day period, expressed as a percentage calculated by a method which shall be prescribed by the Bureau in regulations.

children.label: A
children.text: means the annualized rate of interest paid with respect to each compounding period, expressed as a percentage; and

children.label: B
children.text: may be referred to as the “annual percentage rate”.

children.heading: Bureau
children.label: 4 Bureau
children.text: The term “Bureau” means the Bureau of Consumer Financial Protection.

children.label: A
children.text: has the meaning given to such term in section 1831f(f)(1) of this title; and1See References in Text note below.1

children.label: B
children.text: includes any person who solicits any amount from any other person for deposit in an insured depository institution.

children.heading: Depository institution
children.label: 6 Depository institution
children.text: The term “depository institution” has the meaning given such term in clauses (i) through (vi) of , but does not include any nonautomated credit union that was not required to comply with the requirements of this chapter as of , pursuant to the determination of the National Credit Union Administration Bureau.section 461(b)(1)(A) of this title21September 30, 1996So in original. Probably should be “Board.”2

children.heading: Interest
children.label: 7 Interest
children.text: The term “interest” includes dividends paid with respect to share draft accounts which are accounts within the meaning of paragraph (3).

children.heading: Multiple rate account
children.label: 8 Multiple rate account
children.text: The term “multiple rate account” means any account that has 2 or more annual rates of simple interest which take effect at the same time or in succeeding periods and which are known at the time of disclosure.
